title: David Portz
compiled_truth: David Portz is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-03-14), David Portz sent 148 and received 1144 emails, totalling 1292 interactions. Top correspondents: [Elizabeth Sager](people/elizabeth-sager) (105), [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (29), [Leslie Hansen](people/leslie-hansen) (24), [Edward Sacks](people/edward-sacks) (21), [Mike Curry](people/mike-curry) (16).
